shot_plan.purpose: Establish world, location, and scale before subject focus.
shot_plan.scene_progression: Introduce the mysterious scientific fact or phenomenon with engaging visuals and questions

shot_plan.purpose: Escalate focus toward subject or revelation.
shot_plan.scene_progression: Explore different scientific perspectives and experiments related to the mystery

shot_plan.purpose: Present subject at peak visual power for final impression.
shot_plan.scene_progression: Reveal the scientific explanation and evidence resolving the mystery, encouraging critical thinking

shot_plan_summary: Clip 1: establishing_shot — Introduce the mysterious scientific fact or phenomenon with engaging visuals and questions
Clip 2: dolly_in — Explore different scientific perspectives and experiments related to the mystery
Clip 3: hero_shot — Reveal the scientific explanation and evidence resolving the mystery, encouraging critical thinking

camera_language.camera_movement: slow dramatic push-in — Slow wide push or locked wide frame with environmental depth layers.
camera_language.composition: symmetrical framing with depth layers and practical light
camera_language.visual_objective: Introduce the mysterious scientific fact or phenomenon with engaging visuals and questions — evoke period weight and narrative gravitas

camera_language.camera_movement: slow dramatic push-in — Smooth forward dolly push with tightening composition.
camera_language.framing: symmetrical framing with depth layers and practical light
camera_language.composition: symmetrical framing with depth layers and practical light
camera_language.visual_objective: Explore different scientific perspectives and experiments related to the mystery — evoke period weight and narrative gravitas

camera_language.camera_movement: Low or centered hero framing with controlled push-in or hold.
camera_language.framing: centered hero frame with chin-safe headroom
camera_language.composition: symmetrical framing with depth layers and practical light
camera_language.visual_objective: Reveal the scientific explanation and evidence resolving the mystery, encouraging critical thinking — evoke period weight and narrative gravitas
